caption:
🌧️ Rain slicked the neon-drenched streets of Neo-Tokyo, dripping down my cybernetic collar like digital tears. I adjusted the high-collared leather harness, the synthetic silk beneath it hugging every curve I needed it to.

My mission was simple: infiltrate the corporate server and download the encryption key. But the client was more intrigued by my silhouette than my data skills. As I moved through the crowded alley, the heat of the crowd against my thighs felt electric. The tight bodysuit creaked softly with my movements, a secret sound between my breath and the hum of the city.

Suddenly, a shadow blocked the light. He stepped closer, the scent of ozone and cologne filling the air. "You look dangerous," he whispered, his hand brushing the fabric of my jacket. I leaned in, the metallic cool of his skin contrasting with the warmth of the neon.

"Only when I'm hunting," I murmured, feeling the pulse in my neck. The alley narrowed, the rain hitting my shoulders like a curtain. His grip tightened on my waist, pulling me closer as the world dissolved into static. I could feel his heart syncing with mine, a dangerous rhythm beneath the tech.

One touch, one stolen kiss, and the code was in my head. I knew exactly who I was to him, and he knew exactly how I fit. In a world of chrome and lies, we were the only real thing in the dark.

#CyberpunkLove #NeonNights #FutureFashion #DigitalDesire #SciFiRomance
